title: Rebound In Chinas Consumer Spending Growth
section_path: Rebound In Chinas Consumer Spending Growth
section_path_text: Rebound In Chinas Consumer Spending Growth
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly China Report, China's retail sales in September grew year-on-year by 3.2%. This has marked a solid increase from the 2.1% growth seen in August. Taking September's 0.4% inflation into account, retail sales adjusted for inflation grew year-on-year by 2.8%.
